title: Pink Stitching Girl Baby Shower Invitations, 8ct
features: Package of 8 Baby Pink Stitching Invitations
Baby Pink Stitching Invitations measure 5.5" x 4"
Baby Pink Stitching Invitations feature blank space inside to write important baby shower details
Baby Pink Stitching Invitations come with 8 envelopes for easy mailing
Coordinate with other Baby Pink Stitching baby shower party supplies and party decorations from Unique
description: Let everyone know about your upcoming baby shower with our adorable Baby Pink Stitching Invitations. Our baby shower invitations feature baby blanket inspired details with "Baby Shower" text and conveniently come with 8 envelopes for easy mailing. Invitations feature blank space on the inside to write important baby shower details. Coordinate Baby Pink Stitching Invitations with other party supplies and solid color or baby shower themed decorations. Baby Pink Stitching Invitations come with 8 invites and 8 envelopes and measure 5.5" x 4".
